title: Cranberry Dumplings
description: A sweet and tangy dessert made with Ukrainian-style dumplings and dried cranberries.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour and sugar.
Add melted butter, eggs, and vanilla extract. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces. Roll each piece into a ball and flatten slightly.
Place 1-2 tablespoons of dried cranberries in the center of each dough piece.
Cover the filling with the dough, pressing the edges together to seal.
Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Gently add the dumplings.
Cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the dumplings float to the surface.
Serve warm with powdered sugar or whipped cream.
